title: Sick Internet
content:
The Internet has been sick for about a week already. It's all happened after the earthquake in Taiwan (Dec 27) which cause the underwater cable, the backbone, to be broken. And the round-trip delay time ([RTT](http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Round-trip_delay_time)) graphs has gone up, way up. Obviously, these graphs read "lower is better".

google.com
![](https://macsfvent.sgp1.cdn.digitaloceanspaces.com/media/2006/12/mrtg/ping.google-week.png)

yahoo.com
![](https://macsfvent.sgp1.cdn.digitaloceanspaces.com/media/2006/12/mrtg/ping.yahoocom-week.png)

macsf.net
![](https://macsfvent.sgp1.cdn.digitaloceanspaces.com/media/2006/12/mrtg/ping.macsf-week.png)

finalpiece.net
![](https://macsfvent.sgp1.cdn.digitaloceanspaces.com/media/2006/12/mrtg/ping.finalpiecenet-week.png)

Unfortunately, the route to finalpiece's online server was pretty much blocked during the last couple days of work. Good, I guess. I got new year break early. :P

I know this shouldn't be the last post of 2006 but I'll have to make do with it.

Anyway ...

I'd like to wish you all a wonderful and prosperous 2007.

Happy New Year!
